channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lamu East MP Backs Dangote's KSh 2.2 Trillion Refinery for Economic Growth and Jobs
item.description: MP Ruweida Mohamed has strongly supported Aliko Dangote's KSh 2.2 trillion oil refinery project in Lamu County, highlighting its potential to boost local employment and economic revival. The project, ...

item.title: Google Faces EU Fines but Seeks to Avoid Further Penalties Through Dialogue
item.description: Google, the tech giant under Alphabet, has been fined a total of €890 million ($1 billion) by the European Commission for violating EU regulations under the Digital Markets Act (DMA). The fines, total...

item.title: South Africa's Education System Adapts to a 50% Population Increase Since 1994
item.description: The article explores how South Africa's education system has managed to adapt to a 50% population increase since 1994, despite significant challenges. While overcrowded classrooms and resource shortag...

item.title: Government sets four-month deadline to complete Karatu onion market project
item.description: The article discusses the government's decision to set a four-month deadline for completing the Karatu onion market. This initiative aims to address delays in infrastructure development that have hind...

item.title: Internet and Mobile Services Resume in AJK's Mirpur Ahead of Elections After 45-Day Suspension
item.description: Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) Chairman Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari confirmed the restoration of mobile and internet services in Mirpur city and its surrounding areas of Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) followin...

item.title: Saskatchewan Roughriders Fans Deal with Grief After Tragic Crash Before Game
item.description: Saskatchewan Roughriders fans are facing emotional turmoil ahead of their game against the Edmonton Elks following a tragic highway crash that claimed the lives of linebacker Jayden Dalke and Bhishma ...

item.title: Former Trump Delegate Condemns Misleading Claims About Front Row Joes' Financial Sacrifices
item.description: Texas Republican delegate Trisha Hope, a former member of Donald Trump's loyalist group known as the Front Row Joes, criticized Trump's assertion that the group 'makes a lot of money.' In a social med...

item.title: Philippines seeks to mend ties with China after West Philippine Sea incident
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has initiated diplomatic efforts to improve the Philippines' relationship with China following the July 20 confrontation between Philippine Navy personnel and Chinese Co...

item.title: Mixed Reactions to PM Modi's Fast-Track Courts for Paper Leaks Amid Student Protests
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's announcement of fast-track courts to address paper leak cases in exams has sparked a mix of support and criticism. The decision, aimed at ensuring exemplary punishment f...

item.title: AFL Match Highlights: Crows Dominate Pies in Adelaide Clash
item.description: The AFL match between the Adelaide Crows and Collingwood Magpies at Adelaide Oval showcased a dominant performance by the Crows' tall forwards, with Taylor Walker marking his 700th goal in a thrilling...

item.title: High Court Judge Details Okoth Obado's Motive in Sharon Otieno Murder Case
item.description: High Court Judge Cecilia Githua has detailed the motive behind former Migori Governor Okoth Obado's alleged murder of Sharon Otieno, a Rongo University student. The judge ruled that Obado had an intim...

item.title: Luciana Ojeniyi Uses AI to Revolutionize Nigerian Fashion E-Commerce
item.description: Luciana Ojeniyi, a former corporate sales leader, launched Luciana Womenswear, Nigeria's first AI-powered virtual try-on platform for e-commerce. The brand addresses the common issue of online shopper...

item.title: Editors Guild Condemns Attacks on Media During Youth Protests, Calls for Fair Reporting
item.description: The Editors Guild of India has condemned the attacks on media personnel during youth protests, emphasizing that biased reporting cannot justify such violence. The guild issued a statement after videos...

item.title: Google faces €890 million EU fine for anti-competitive app store and search practices
item.description: Google has been fined a total of €890 million (A$1.45 billion) by the European Commission for violating EU regulations aimed at curbing the power of Big Tech. The penalties, under the Digital Markets ...

item.title: AMD Launches New AI Hardware to Compete with Nvidia in Data Center Market
item.description: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is set to unveil its next-generation AI hardware at an event in San Francisco, aiming to challenge Nvidia's dominance in the data centre chip sector. The company plans to ...

item.title: ServiceNow invests $40M in BusinessNext to boost AI-driven financial services expansion
item.description: ServiceNow, a U.S. enterprise software company specializing in workflow automation, has invested $40 million in BusinessNext, an Indian banking software firm valued at $700 million. This partnership a...

item.title: Spaza Shop Funding Support Programme Launched in South Africa
item.description: The Department of Small Business Development (DSBD) has launched the Spaza Shop Support Fund to assist eligible spaza shops and food-handling outlets across South Africa. The initiative, introduced in...

item.title: Dasmariñas City provides P50 million to Comelec to help fund August 29 special congressional elections
item.description: The Dasmariñas City government in Cavite has donated P50 million to the Commission on Elections (Comelec) to support the conduct of the special elections in the city's lone congressional district sche...

item.title: Tanzania Pushes for Global AI Regulations and Unveils Lake Victoria Fisheries Initiative
item.description: Tanzania has called for the establishment of global guidelines to ensure the responsible use of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies, emphasizing the need for international cooperation to address...

item.title: Contempt Charges Against Barrister Threaten Legal Representation in Palestine Action Trial
item.description: The article discusses the legal controversy surrounding barrister Rajiv Menon KC, who faces contempt charges for his closing speech to a jury in a Palestine Action criminal damage trial. The case high...
